description: CDP-based browser automation using user's existing Edge/Chrome browser. No API key needed.

edgeOrChrome.description: Microsoft Edge or Google Chrome with remote debugging port enabled

setupInstructions: 1. 确保 Edge 或 Chrome 已开启 remote debugging: Edge --remote-debugging-port=9222
2. (可选) 查看 SKILL.md 了解平台踩坑经验
verifySetup: Edge remote debugging port 9222 is listening: curl -s http://127.0.0.1:9222/json/version | head -c 100
